content: Salesperson selection is required in invoice create and edit flows.

name: Incremental json_serializable migration
description: Migrate small core models first (StaffMember, Customer, AdjustmentReason) while preserving fromMap/toMap signatures to avoid repository-layer churn.

name: Reports overview layout
description: Replaced commissions-only report route with a branch-aware reports overview that combines KPI summary, revenue trend, payment mix, invoice lifecycle mix, top products, and commission leaderboard in one screen.
